title: Infiniarmory
description: Transform any tool or armor into a different one of the same type! Turn your wooden hoe into a netherite one as soon as you start!
body:
![Avaliable as Datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d26d277c615459d01f3480b77b79f1132d61c0a8.png)
![Avaliable as Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a17ddbcb88a7ea8e5c245b30eba6b151c0070ef.png)
[![Read the Wiki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95da6e7c8912a2e4caf51882d0187bc9a77fd51a.png)](https://infiniverse.gitbook.io/)
[![Chat with us on Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4ca9a5bb2d57afa6019b34cd08b90b1cfb930ce.png)](https://discord.gg/WBqEXSt9qy)

---

A datapack/mod that allows you to change the material of any tool or armor via a stonecutter.

For a full list of features, please refer to the wiki (linked on sidebar).

This datapack/mod adds a lot of features. Mainly recipes. Let's go over some of them:
<details>
<summary>Added Features (SPOILERS)</summary>

1. It adds 25 new functions to the game. You can access these with `/function infinitools:give_tools/(function)`, `/function infinitools:give_armor/(function)`, or `/function infinitools:all`. These give you all of the tools and/or armor based on the type or material. Use Minecraft's built-in command selector to view all, or see the wiki.

2. It allows you to transform any tool into another with the same type but different (or same) material. For example, if you put a stone shovel into a stonecutter, you can turn it into a netherite shovel! **Now supports bows & crossbows!**

3. It allows you to transform any armor into another with the same type but different (or same) material. For example, if you put an iron chestplate into a stonecutter, you can turn it into a netherite chestplate!

4. As a little easter egg, all hoes that are obtained this way through a stonecutter have Loyalty! The enchantment does nothing since it's not on a trident, but still, it's pretty fun. Now who said you can't have loyal hoes?!
</details>
